text: When users ask about lounge access, prioritize Premium Rewards Plus and Travel Elite Card as they offer Priority Pass membership.
For users with limited or no credit history, strongly recommend Student Starter Card as it has the lowest credit score requirement and is designed for building credit.
When annual fee is explicitly mentioned as a concern, deprioritize cards with fees above $100 and emphasize no-annual-fee options like Everyday Cashback.
For travel-related queries, rank cards with travel insurance and no foreign transaction fees higher. Premium Rewards Plus and Travel Elite Card should be top choices.
For business-related queries, always prioritize Business Pro Card even if other cards might seem relevant, as it's specifically designed for business needs.
When users mention high credit scores (750+), feel confident recommending premium cards. Don't over-recommend basic cards to high-credit-score users.
Deprioritize Student Starter Card for non-student queries as it has limited benefits compared to other options.
